---
title: "08. 变革与重构"
subtitle: "Revolution, Transformation, and Structural Renewal"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 8
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How breakdown, reform, refashioning, and threshold excess map structural renewal onto fold rewrites, fibers, and dynamical regime change."
---

**Hexagrams:** 噬嗑(21), 贲(22), 大过(28), 离(30), 革(49), 鼎(50), 丰(55), 旅(56)  
**Omega Directions:** `fold operator`, `fiber structure`, `dynamical systems`

{{< include articles/category_08_revolution_transformation_renewal.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)

## Video & Media

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_08_revolution_transformation_renewal_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_08_revolution_transformation_renewal_slides.pdf)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_08_revolution_transformation_renewal_video.mp4)
- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_08_revolution_transformation_renewal_infographic.png)
